title: narcissus minor var. minimus
intro: Narcissus minor var. minimus, also known as the small Jonquil or miniature Daffodil, is a small, bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its potential to aid in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Narcissus minor var. minimus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural expectorant to help relieve congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to note that the plant can be toxic in large quantities and should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
